notes: The expanded pre-v1 corpus boundary is frozen as of 2026-06-28 at six cases and 41 manifest documents: lincoln 5, am-rev 11, napoleon 11, hitler 8, fr-rev 2, and wwi-britain 4. #180 added targeted American Revolution, Lincoln, and Napoleon documents; #178 and #179 added fr-rev and wwi-britain as compact draft expansion corpora; #181 ran the expanded material through first-pass Codex-assisted MIPVU review, CMT/Koenigsberg annotation where supported, concordance, case analysis, cross-case synthesis, validation, and traceability regeneration. These annotation-forward artifacts remain provisional until independent human review. Deferred candidates from the expansion matrix are future-work candidates, not part of the frozen pre-v1 corpus. Lincoln retains historical model-reliability artifacts for the prior three-document core and designed human-reliability cohorts, but required human coder submissions are not complete and the expanded Lincoln corpus still needs reliability resampling before promotion. American Revolution, Napoleon, Hitler, fr-rev, and wwi-britain model and human reliability workflows remain absent or incomplete for publication-grade promotion. Remaining milestone work should update reliability sampling before claim promotion resumes.
